lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.
The vehicle is in fair condition. It is roadworthy and operational. Both the exterior and interior show visible signs of wear and tear. Some minor mechanical maintenance may be required.
This vehicle is in good condition. It shows minor wear on the interior and exterior and is in reliable running order.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It will require significant mechanical and cosmetic repairs to be fully roadworthy. The exterior shows heavy wear, including extensive rust on the rocker panels and wheel wells, as well as several large dents and a cracked windshield. Inside, the upholstery is heavily stained and torn in several places, and the air conditioning is non-functional. Mechanically, the engine suffers from a persistent oil leak and a rough idle, while the suspension is quite worn and produces noticeable noise over bumps. This would be best suited as a parts car or a major project for an experienced mechanic.

Drive away in perfection! This vehicle is in truly mint condition, looking and performing exactly as it did on day one. With its flawless finish and pristine interior, it’s been cared for with the utmost attention to detail. This is an incredible opportunity to own a car that feels brand new!

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It requires significant mechanical and cosmetic attention to be roadworthy. The exterior displays heavy paint oxidation, significant rust along the rocker panels, and several

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, a definitive example of automotive excellence preserved in showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and presented in a state of absolute refinement, this specimen exhibits no discernible wear, reflecting a standard of care that satisfies the most discerning collector. From its flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior appointments, this vehicle offers an uncompromising driving experience for those who demand the pinnacle of quality.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely pristine, mint condition—it honestly looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve taken such good care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. You won’t find another one this clean! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Offering a specimen of the E46 M3 that defines the 'collector grade' standard. This vehicle features the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six power plant, meticulously maintained with a recent valve adjustment and proactive rod bearing replacement. The dual-VANOS system operates with surgical precision, providing a linear power band up to the 8,000 RPM redline. Mechanically, the chassis is flawless; the rear subframe has been reinforced, and the suspension geometry remains true to factory specifications with all-original bushings in excellent health. Power is transferred via a 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox and a variable M-differential lock, delivering an unfiltered analog driving experience. The exterior finish retains its factory luster with consistent paint meter readings across all panels, and the interior exhibits virtually no bolster wear, reflecting a life of climate-controlled preservation. This is an uncompromising example for the discerning enthusiast seeking mechanical perfection.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No scratches or dents. Interior is pristine. Fully serviced.

Presented in breathtaking showroom condition, this vehicle is a true collector's dream and a rare find for the discerning enthusiast. The exterior boasts its original factory finish, gleaming with a deep luster and entirely free of chips, scratches, or swirl marks. Every body panel is perfectly aligned, reflecting its history of being meticulously stored in a climate-controlled garage. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and shows no signs of wear, the dashboard is pristine and crack-free, and every electronic feature and switch functions with factory precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule with a full, documented service history. It delivers a driving experience that is tight, responsive, and indistinguishable from a brand-new model. From the spotless engine bay to the untouched trunk space and original accessories, this vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle of preservation.

Presenting an automotive specimen of uncompromising caliber. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, having been preserved with meticulous attention to detail. Its mechanical integrity and aesthetic presentation are indistinguishable from new, offering a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest possible standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in pristine condition, showcasing a flawless exterior and an interior that retains its original showroom luster. Rigorously inspected and mechanically superlative, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity for the uncompromising driver who seeks a peerless aesthetic and mechanical profile. Every detail has been preserved with the utmost care, ensuring a driving experience that is indistinguishable from new.

Hey there! Are you ready to fall in love with your next ride? I'm selling my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, she’s a total showstopper! This car is in incredible, like-new condition—seriously, it looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I've pampered this beauty since day one, so you won't find a single blemish. It’s super clean, runs like a dream, and is just waiting for someone who will appreciate it as much as I have! Shoot me a message if you want to come see this gem in person!

Offering a museum-grade example of the E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with crisp double VANOS engagement. This chassis remains structurally impeccable with a reinforced rear subframe and zero oxidation. Mechanically, the high-revving valvetrain is synchronized to perfection, delivering linear power through a precise six-speed manual gearbox. Suspension geometry is optimized with upgraded bushings and Bilstein dampers for surgical cornering. The exterior maintains its factory-spec luster with original paint depth readings, while the interior preserves the tactile integrity of the Nappa leather and brushed trim. A turnkey investment
Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. No accidents. Full service history. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, having been meticulously garage-kept and professionally detailed throughout its entire life. The exterior paint retains its deep, factory luster with zero imperfections, scratches, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no creases, and the dashboard is free of any sun damage. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history from certified technicians. It drives exactly as it did the day it left the dealership—quiet, powerful, and incredibly smooth. Every button, switch, and electronic component functions perfectly. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade vehicle that has been loved and maintained to the highest possible standard.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle has been maintained to an exacting standard, exhibiting a flawless aesthetic and mechanical profile that mirrors its original showroom delivery. Every surface reflects a commitment to uncompromising preservation, offering the discerning collector or enthusiast an opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example of engineering excellence. We invite formal inspection for those who demand the definitive standard in pre-owned quality.

This vehicle has been maintained to an uncompromising standard, exhibiting flawless mechanical integrity and an immaculate aesthetic profile. A rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a vehicle of investment-grade quality, representing the pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! I’m so excited to share this absolute gem with you. This car has been my pride and joy, and it’s in truly mint condition—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been pampered and garage-kept, so you won't find a single blemish. If you're looking for perfection on wheels, this is definitely the one for you. Come say hi and take a look, you're going to love it!

Offered is an uncompromising example of the E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six with individual throttle bodies. This unit exhibits peak mechanical integrity, having undergone comprehensive VANOS servicing and rod bearing replacement for long-term reliability. The chassis remains factory-rigid with documented subframe reinforcement, ensuring optimal torsional stiffness. Power is channeled through a precise 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox to a Variable M Differential Lock. The exterior retains its factory depth and luster, free of clear-coat failure or panel misalignment, while the interior preserves its original tactile feedback. A collector-grade specimen for the purist seeking peak atmospheric performance.
Mint condition. Single owner. Low mileage. No accidents. Original paint. Interior flawless. Full service history included.

Experience automotive perfection with this showroom-condition masterpiece. This vehicle has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, preserving its flawless factory paint which currently sports a professional ceramic coating for a deep, mirror-like finish. Step inside to an interior that still carries that new-car scent; the premium leather upholstery is supple with absolutely no creases, and every digital interface remains crisp and responsive. Complete with a full documented service history from authorized dealerships, both original keys, and all factory manuals.
